objective: Improve glitchlab/auditor/task_writer.py to generate more tasks per scan. Three changes: 1) In the system_prompt string, replace "max 2-3 files per task" with "aim to generate 8-12 tasks per scan" and add this sentence: "For large_file findings, create one refactor task per file. For todo findings, create one cleanup task. Group missing_doc findings into at most 2 tasks. Prioritize tasks that touch single files and tag them with mode: surgical in the task data." 2) In the create_task tool handler, add mode: surgical to task_data when the constraints list contains only one file path (detect by checking if exactly one constraint mentions a filename ending in .py, .rs, .ts, or .js). 3) Change max_steps from 20 to 30. Do not touch scanner.py, cli.py, or any agent files. Verify: python -m ruff check glitchlab/auditor/task_writer.py && python -m pytest tests/ -x -q
